items.title: Record buy O'Sullivan leaves Liverpool for Gotham
items.summary: Liverpool club record signing Denise O'Sullivan leaves to join Gotham FC, just six months after joining the Reds.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Commissioner Rob Manfred Defends Salary Cap Push, Says Owners Unified Amid CBA Talks
items.summary: In Philadelphia on Tuesday, Rob Manfred detailed MLB's collective bargaining proposal, making a strong public push for a salary cap.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England rue selection errors after Patel and Sundar lead India to comfortable win
items.summary: England 258 lost to India 262-4 by six wickets All-rounders share century stand to secure victory A recent ascent to No 1 in the men’s T20 international rankings saved one half...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
